en: I appeal to you therefore, brothers, by the mercies of God, to present your bodies as a living sacrifice, holy and acceptable to God, which is your spiritual worship.
zh: 所以弟兄們，我憑著 神的仁慈勸你們，要把身體獻上，作聖潔而蒙 神悅納的活祭；這是你們理所當然的事奉 。

en: Do not be conformed to this world, but be transformed by the renewal of your mind, that by testing you may discern what is the will of God, what is good and acceptable and perfect.
zh: 不要模仿這個世代，倒要藉著心意的更新而改變過來，使你們可以察驗出甚麼是 神的旨意，就是察驗出甚麼是美好的、蒙他悅納的和完全的事。

en: For by the grace given to me I say to everyone among you not to think of himself more highly than he ought to think, but to think with sober judgment, each according to the measure of faith that God has assigned.
zh: 我憑著所賜給我的恩典，對你們各人說，不可自視太高，高於所當看的，反而應該照著 神分給各人信心的大小，看得適中。

en: For as in one body we have many members, and the members do not all have the same function,
zh: 就像一個身體有許多肢體，各肢體都有不同的功用；

en: so we, though many, are one body in Christ, and individually members one of another.
zh: 照樣，我們大家在基督裡成為一個身體，也是互相作肢體。

en: Having gifts that differ according to the grace given to us, let us use them: if prophecy, in proportion to our faith;
zh: 照著所賜給我們的恩典，我們各有不同的恩賜：說預言的，就應當照著信心的程度去說；

en: if service, in our serving; the one who teaches, in his teaching;
zh: 服事人的，就應當照著恩賜去服事；教導的，就應當照著恩賜教導；

en: the one who exhorts, in his exhortation; the one who contributes, in generosity; the one who leads, with zeal; the one who does acts of mercy, with cheerfulness.
zh: 勸慰的，就應當照著恩賜勸慰；把財物分給人的要真誠；領導的要殷勤；行善的要樂意。

en: Let love be genuine. Abhor what is evil; hold fast to what is good.
zh: 愛，不可虛偽；惡，要厭惡；善，要持守。

en: Love one another with brotherly affection. Outdo one another in showing honor.
zh: 要以手足之愛彼此相親，用恭敬的心互相禮讓。

en: Do not be slothful in zeal, be fervent in spirit, serve the Lord.
zh: 殷勤不可懶惰，心靈要火熱，常常服事主；

en: Rejoice in hope, be patient in tribulation, be constant in prayer.
zh: 在盼望中要喜樂，在患難中要堅忍，禱告要恆切。

en: Contribute to the needs of the saints and seek to show hospitality.
zh: 聖徒有缺乏的，就要接濟；客旅要熱誠地款待。

en: Bless those who persecute you; bless and do not curse them.
zh: 迫害你們的，要為他們祝福；只可祝福，不可咒詛。

en: Rejoice with those who rejoice, weep with those who weep.
zh: 要與喜樂的人一同喜樂，與哀哭的人一同哀哭。

en: Live in harmony with one another. Do not be haughty, but associate with the lowly. Never be conceited.
zh: 要彼此同心，不可心高氣傲，倒要俯就卑微的。不可自以為聰明。

en: Repay no one evil for evil, but give thought to do what is honorable in the sight of all.
zh: 不可以惡報惡。大家以為美的事，要努力去作。

en: If possible, so far as it depends on you, live peaceably with all.
zh: 可能的話，總要盡你們的所能與人和睦。

en: Beloved, never avenge yourselves, but leave it to the wrath of God, for it is written, "Vengeance is mine, I will repay, says the Lord."
zh: 親愛的啊，不要為自己伸冤，寧可等候主的忿怒，因為經上記著，主說：“伸冤在我，我必報應。”

en: To the contrary, "if your enemy is hungry, feed him; if he is thirsty, give him something to drink; for by so doing you will heap burning coals on his head."
zh: 相反地，“如果你的仇敵餓了，就給他吃；如果渴了，就給他喝。因為你這樣作，就是把炭火堆在他的頭上。”

en: Do not be overcome by evil, but overcome evil with good.
zh: 不可被惡所勝，反要以善勝惡。
